home.create_first_desc: 论文、学位论文或技术报告。从配置文件开始。
home.latex_missing: 未安装 LaTeX 编译器 — 无法生成 PDF。
home.latex_install_hint: 安装 Tectonic、MiKTeX 或 TeX Live 以进行编译。
home.last_session_recent: Your last session was less than a day ago.
home.resume_hint: Ready to pick up where you left off.
home.step_start_hint: Create a new thesis or import an existing one.
home.step_setup_hint: Choose profile, university, level and language.
home.step_write_hint_project: Return to your most recent project.
home.step_write_hint_empty: Open a project to start writing.
home.step_review_hint: Adjust language, spelling and writing aids.
home.step_deliver_hint_project: Compile, verify the PDF and export your submission.
home.step_deliver_hint_empty: Compile your project when you have content.
home.error_subtitle: TeXisStudio did not modify your project. Check the detail and try again.
home.import_subtitle: Creates a TeXisStudio project keeping the original LaTeX content so you can migrate it gradually to the visual editor.
home.import_folder_placeholder: Select where to create the project folder
home.import_note: The original will be saved in imports/source.tex and the content will enter as confirmed LaTeX to preserve fidelity.
home.basic_mode_description: TeXisStudio is in guided mode: focus on your work and the app will handle formatting, bibliography, and delivery.
home.error_opening_project: Could not open that folder as a TeXisStudio project. Make sure it contains tesis.project.yaml.

wizard.title: 新建项目
wizard.author: 作者
wizard.doc_tesis_meta: 本科 · 硕士 · 博士
wizard.doc_tesina_desc: 结构简单的短篇或专论。
wizard.doc_tesis_desc: 本科或研究生的正式学术研究。
wizard.doc_especialidad_desc: 专业或临床类研究工作。
wizard.doc_type_subtitle: 选择最适合您课程的类型。
wizard.context_subtitle: These details are used for the cover, profile recommendation, and PDF metadata.
wizard.choose_profile_subtitle: We suggest one for you. If your exact institution is not listed, start with the closest match and change it later.
wizard.recommendation_default_reason: We chose it as a safe starting point for this type of work.
wizard.doc_type_hint: 短篇论文 · 学位论文 · 研究生
wizard.error_title_required: Enter a project title before continuing.
wizard.error_folder_required: Select a folder where the project will be saved.
wizard.assistant_subtitle: We guide you to get the project ready without requiring LaTeX knowledge. Everything can be adjusted later.
wizard.why_profile_body: It defines the LaTeX class, packages, bibliography style, and sections. It can be changed later.
wizard.output_folder_label: Folder where the project will be created
wizard.folder_creation_suffix: will be created inside this path.
wizard.cloud_backup_title: Save in the cloud for automatic backup
wizard.cloud_backup_body: We detected these sync folders on your computer. Click one to use it as the destination.
wizard.review_subtitle: You are one step away from creating your project. Later you can write, review, and deliver without touching LaTeX directly.
wizard.language_support_later: You can enable academic or disciplinary vocabularies later from Settings.
wizard.language_subtitle: This does not change the document structure; it helps recommend spelling, grammar, and useful vocabularies for your area.
wizard.suggested_stack_body: The recommended setup combines a general dictionary for the language with academic vocabularies and, when applicable, one specific to your area or program.
wizard.no_vocab_match: No specific vocabulary matches your selection yet. You can enable a general one and add your own vocabulary later from Settings.
wizard.cloud_tip_prefix: We did not detect OneDrive or Google Drive on your computer. For automatic backup, you can install
wizard.cloud_tip_suffix: and then use that folder as the destination. Your thesis will sync automatically.
wizard.builtin_thesis_desc: 适用于本科、专项、硕士、博士或博士后工作的经典结构。
wizard.builtin_thesis_meta: 论文 · 自动参考文献 · APA 7
wizard.builtin_tesina_desc: 本科简化版：引言、正文和结论。
wizard.builtin_tesina_meta: 小论文 · 自动参考文献 · APA 7
wizard.error_author_required: 继续前请输入您的全名。
wizard.error_vocab_install: "{{name}}"无法激活。请检查网络连接或取消选择。详情：{{error}}
wizard.google_drive_desktop: 桌面版 Google 云端硬盘

grammar.privacy_notice: Text is sent to LanguageTool servers for analysis.
grammar.guided_body: Use it to spot wording, agreement, and punctuation issues. It is helpful before delivery, but it does not replace your academic judgment or your advisor's review.
grammar.error_api: Could not connect to LanguageTool. Check your connection.

settings.title: 设置
settings.spell_not_supported: No spell checker available for this language
settings.dict_custom_empty: No words in your personal dictionary.
settings.community_subtitle: 由社区贡献。一键下载或安装。
settings.community_contribute: 想要贡献？访问代码仓库。
settings.projects_dir_hint: Default path where new projects will be saved.
settings.text_autocorrect_hint: Automatically fixes common mistakes on Space or Enter
settings.text_grammar_hint: Enables the grammar panel in the editor (requires internet)
settings.text_grammar_auto_hint: Sends text to LanguageTool when saving each section
settings.text_mode_basic_hint: The writing, review, and delivery tools are shown first. Technical details stay hidden until you need them.
settings.text_mode_advanced_hint: Technical controls, compilation details, and fine-grained options are shown for users who want to see the full stack.
settings.ui_scale_hint: Increases the app text without changing the PDF typography. Controls grow a little to avoid clipped text.
settings.grammar_remote_note: 目前，语法检查以远程模式使用LanguageTool。有助于检查写作，但会将文本发送到服务进行分析。
settings.spell_lang_hint_1: 西班牙语和英语包含内置的Hunspell词典。对于其他语言，请从
settings.spell_lang_hint_2: 包含拼写检查的部分安装语言包。
settings.basic_mode_body: 仅显示无复杂性地编写和提交所需的内容。您可以启用
settings.basic_top_body: 这些设置旨在不涉及LaTeX技术细节的情况下做出有用决策。切换到
settings.update_available: {{version}} 版本可用 — 重启以安装
settings.update_disabled: 此版本未配置自动更新
settings.dict_format_hint: 格式：每行一个术语（.txt，无标题）
settings.user_defaults_hint: 创建新项目时，这些详细信息将用作默认值。
settings.latex_primary_hint: 选择默认情况下应使用的引擎 TeXisStudio。您仍然可以针对特定编译覆盖它。
settings.latex_tectonic_description: 重量轻且易于维护。推荐用于日常写作和不需要完整 TeX 发行版的项目。
settings.latex_suite_description: 将 Latexmk 与 TeX Live 或 MiKTeX 一起使用。推荐用于高级包、复杂的参考书目和最终交付。
settings.latex_fallback_title: 当主引擎不可用时使用另一个引擎
settings.latex_fallback_hint: 保留配置的优先级。 TeXisStudio仅在主发动机无法使用时切换。
settings.latex_install_hint: 从设置助手安装或修复 LaTeX 引擎，然后在此处刷新检测。
settings.window_mode_hint: 选择 1280 × 760 窗口，恢复上次使用的尺寸，或使用所有可用的显示器空间打开。

validation.E_MISSING_IMAGE_msg: Image '{{file}}' referenced in section '{{section}}' not found.
validation.E_MISSING_IMAGE_sug: Add the file at content/figures/{{file}} or fix the name.
validation.E_UNSAFE_FIGURE_PATH_msg: Unsafe or empty figure path '{{path}}' in section '{{section}}'.
validation.E_UNSAFE_FIGURE_PATH_sug: Use relative filenames only, without '..' or absolute paths.
validation.E_DUPLICATE_LABEL_sug: Change the label to be unique across the project.
validation.E_INVALID_CITATION_KEY_msg: Citation key '{{key}}' in section '{{section}}' is not valid for BibTeX.
validation.E_INVALID_CITATION_KEY_sug: Use only letters, digits, '_', '-', '.' and ':' with no spaces.
validation.E_CITATION_KEY_NOT_IN_BIB_msg: Citation '{{key}}' in section '{{section}}' is not in references.bib.
validation.W_MISSING_BIB_sug: Create the file with your references in BibTeX format.
validation.W_BIB_PARSE_ERROR_msg: Could not read references.bib to validate citations.
validation.W_BIB_PARSE_ERROR_sug: Check that the .bib file has valid BibTeX format.
validation.W_UNUSED_REFERENCE_msg: Reference '{{key}}' is in references.bib but not cited in the document.
validation.W_UNUSED_REFERENCE_sug: Cite the reference in the text or remove it from .bib.
validation.W_INVALID_LABEL_msg: Label '{{label}}' contains characters not allowed by LaTeX.
validation.W_INVALID_LABEL_sug: Use only letters, digits, ':', '_', '-' and '.', starting with a letter.
validation.W_UNCONFIRMED_RAW_LATEX_msg: Raw LaTeX block in section '{{section}}' is unconfirmed — will not be compiled.
validation.W_UNCONFIRMED_RAW_LATEX_sug: Confirm the block from the editor.
validation.W_PHD_NO_COMMITTEE_msg: Doctoral thesis has no committee members defined.
validation.W_PHD_NO_COMMITTEE_sug: Add jury members in the metadata panel.
validation.W_POSGRADO_NO_ABSTRACT_EN_msg: Graduate thesis has no English abstract.

document_options.title: Document options
document_options.cjk_detected: Chinese or Japanese text was detected in your document. xeCJK was enabled automatically with
document_options.cjk_change: You can change the font here.
document_options.latex_warning: This field accepts arbitrary LaTeX. An error here can prevent the document from compiling.
document_options.footer: Changes apply the next time you compile the PDF.
document_options.advanced_hint: Enable advanced mode to see fonts, operators, and extra preamble settings.

profile_status.verified_title: Matched against an official source with a verification date.
profile_status.reviewed_title: Reviewed by maintainers. Compiles and validates the base structure.
profile_status.draft_title: Under review. Some fields may be incomplete.
profile_status.experimental_title: No formal review. Useful as a starting point.
profile_status.stale_title: It was verified, but the institutional standard may have changed.
profile_status.deprecated_title: Do not use for new projects.

library.title: 资源库
library.sidebar_counts: 已安装 {{profiles}} 个配置文件
library.pick_profile_title: How to choose a profile without overthinking it
library.pick_profile_body: First search for your institution or a similar one. Then check whether the profile covers your degree, area, and required citation style. If you do not find an exact match, start from a generic profile or the closest variant and adjust it later.
library.no_profiles_found: 未找到与“{{search}}”匹配的配置文件。
library.author: Author
library.status_verified_meaning: Verified with real technical evidence (CI + checked compilation)
library.status_reviewed_meaning: Reviewed by a human editor with source traceability
library.status_experimental_meaning: In development — may contain errors or be incomplete
library.no_sections_add_one: No sections. Add at least one.

progress.no_internal_notes: No sections have internal notes yet.
progress.add_notes_hint: Add notes from each section in the editor.
progress.title: 进度
progress.subtitle: See how ready your project is for continued writing, advisor review, or final delivery.
progress.notes_subtitle: Author notes by section. Visible only in the editor and not included in the PDF.
progress.report_subtitle: Markdown document to share with your advisor. Includes section status and validation issues.
progress.report_empty_hint: Click “Generate report” to create the review document.

ai.selection_required_message: This mode requires you to select a normal text fragment in the editor first.
ai.preview_required_reason: TeXisStudio shows the change before applying it to avoid direct writes to the document.
ai.responsibility_prefix: The assistant supports your work as writer, editor, reviewer, advisor, and simulated examiner.
ai.responsibility_strong: It does not replace any real person.
ai.responsibility_suffix: Authorship, corrections, and responsibility for the work remain with the author.
ai.key_session_only: The key is not saved to disk. It only lasts for this session.
ai.select_text_first: Select text in the editor first
ai.empty_configured: Write a question or choose an assistance mode.
ai.empty_needs_key: Configure your {{provider}} API key to start.

editor_meta.no_committee: No committee — optional for specialty and master’s, recommended for doctorate and postdoctorate
editor_meta.suggested_step_2: 2. Add citations, figures, or tables if needed.
editor_meta.suggested_step_3: 3. Compile to review the PDF before delivery.

compile.ensure_latex_installed_path: Check that a LaTeX compiler is installed and available in PATH.
compile.must_fix_before_delivery: There are issues you must fix before delivery
compile.environment_not_ready: Your environment is not ready yet
compile.ready_to_compile: Your project is ready to try a compilation
compile.next_review_pdf: Review the PDF and generate your delivery package.
compile.next_fix_blockers: Fix blocking issues first. Open technical details only if you need them.
compile.next_wait: Wait for compilation to finish. We will show the useful result first.
compile.next_install_latex: Install a LaTeX compiler to generate and verify your document.
compile.next_compile_when_ready: Compile when ready to validate cover pages, bibliography, and structure.
compile.need_one_of: You need at least one of these:
compile.tectonic_desc: recommended, minimal, does not need Perl
compile.miktex_desc: easy on Windows, downloads packages on demand
compile.glossary_unused_count: {{count}} defined entry/entries unused in the document
compile.regenerate_latex_run: LaTeX files will be regenerated and the app will run
compile.next_steps_body: review the PDF, run the final check if your institution requires it, and then export the delivery package.
compile.compile_first_pdf: Compile first to get a PDF
compile.non_embedded_fonts_warning: There are non-embedded fonts in the PDF
compile.what_does_1: Generates the files needed for your thesis.
compile.what_does_2: Attempts to compile the PDF and detect important errors.
compile.what_does_3: Helps you verify before exporting the final delivery.
compile.when_open_details: When should you open technical details?
compile.when_open_details_body: Only when an error is not clear from the main summary, support asks for it, or you want to review the exact backend used.
compile.preflight_has_errors: 继续前请修复 {{count}} 个错误。
compile.preflight_has_warnings: 发现 {{count}} 个警告，可继续操作。
compile.readiness_compile_title: Project not ready for formal version
compile.readiness_export_subtitle: To export in final mode, first complete the delivery and quality checks.
compile.readiness_compile_subtitle: Compile as draft or review these points before treating this as a formal version.

community_profile.audience_general: General base to start your project.
community_profile.confidence_ci: Verified in automated CI — real evidence of successful compilation.
community_profile.confidence_delivery: Strong evidence of compilation and final delivery.
community_profile.confidence_sample: Includes a sample or useful technical evidence to start with less risk.
community_profile.confidence_novice: A reasonably safe option to start without many adjustments.
community_profile.confidence_review: Review it carefully before adopting it as the main base.
community_profile.limitation_program: Specific to a program; if yours differs, review the details before using it.
community_profile.limitation_discipline: Designed for a concrete area; may require adjustments if your work follows another line.
community_profile.limitation_no_sample: Does not yet show strong end-to-end technical evidence.
community_profile.limitation_general: If your school requires very specific variants, review cover, committee, and bibliography before delivery.

styles.required_fields: ID, Name, and biblatex style are required.
styles.duplicate_id: A style with that ID already exists.
styles.reset_confirm: Restore the default order and styles? Custom styles will be lost.
styles.title: Bibliographic styles
styles.subtitle: Citation style library. Independent from any project. Reorder, add, or customize.
styles.footer_summary: {{total}} styles · {{custom}} custom · order is saved automatically
styles.preview_note: Example: article with 2 authors, volume, issue, pages, and DOI. Approximation — final formatting is produced by LaTeX.
styles.select_style_detail: Select a style to view details
styles.order_hint_line_2: The order determines the dropdown when creating a project.

apa7.name: APA 7
apa7.description: The most widely used style globally. Required in many psychology, education, and social science programs. Seventh edition (2020).

vancouver.name: Vancouver
vancouver.description: Required numeric style for health sciences. References are ordered by appearance. Standard in MEDLINE/PubMed journals.

ieee.name: IEEE
ieee.description: Standard numeric style for engineering, computing, and technology. Widely adopted in engineering schools.

chicago17_notes.name: Chicago 17（注释）
chicago17_notes.full_name: Chicago Manual of Style, 17th Edition, Notes-Bibliography
chicago17_notes.description: Notes and bibliography system for the humanities. Citations appear in footnotes.

chicago17_authordate.name: Chicago 17（作者-年份）
chicago17_authordate.full_name: Chicago Manual of Style, 17th Edition, Author-Date
chicago17_authordate.description: Chicago author-date variant, preferred in social sciences and economics.

mla9.name: MLA 9
mla9.description: Standard for language, literature, and cultural studies in North America. Ninth edition (2021).

harvard.name: Harvard
harvard.description: Author-date style similar to APA. Widely used in UK and Australian universities.

mhra.name: MHRA
mhra.full_name: Modern Humanities Research Association Style Guide 第3版
mhra.description: UK humanities standard similar to Chicago Notes.

abnt.name: ABNT
abnt.description: National standard for academic work in Brazilian universities.

gb7714.name: GB/T 7714
gb7714.description: National standard for theses in Chinese. Required in Chinese universities.

block_editor.notes_title: Internal notes (not included in the PDF)

Initialize model M
For each sample x in D:

  Assign nearest label
Return M

compile_widgets.warnings_found_other: {{count}} warnings found. You can continue anyway.

visual.kind_flow_desc: Process or algorithm with nodes and arrows
visual.kind_molecule_desc: Chemical structure with presets or chemfig
visual.kind_circuit_desc: RC, RLC, op-amp circuits and more
visual.flow_hint: Arrows are generated automatically in sequence. Use advanced mode for custom arrows.
visual.chemfig_hint: chemfig syntax. Check the package documentation for complex formulas.
visual.abc_hint: Use ABC notation — simple and portable. Example:
visual.advanced_mode_body: the automatically generated LaTeX appears below. You can edit it, but changes will be lost if you modify the form.
visual.advanced_placeholder: // Generated LaTeX will appear here when you enable the override
visual.use_override: Use this LaTeX instead of the automatically generated version
visual.preview_available_on_compile: Preview available when compiling the PDF
visual.molecule_compile_hint: Structure generated with chemfig when compiling
visual.chemical_syntax_hint: 使用 ->（反应）、<=>（平衡）、^（气体）和 v（沉淀）

vocabulary.title: Domain vocabularies
vocabulary.subtitle: Enable several at once — they are independent from each other and from the base language.
vocabulary.help_question: I am in the domain vocabulary section. How do I choose a simple, useful combination for my thesis if I do not know what to install?
vocabulary.no_filtered_packs: No packs for this filter combination. Try another one.
vocabulary.no_packs: No packs available. Reload the catalog.
vocabulary.repo_hint_suffix: section. It can be your own GitHub repo.

profile_wizard.error_duplicate_section: A section with that ID already exists.
profile_wizard.profile_name_hint: How it will appear in the profile list when creating a project.
profile_wizard.profile_id_hint: Unique identifier. Only letters, numbers, dots, and hyphens. It is generated automatically but you can edit it.
profile_wizard.description_placeholder: Briefly describe what type of document this profile is for.
profile_wizard.sections_intro: Define the document sections. The order here is the order they will appear in the editor.
profile_wizard.no_sections: No sections — add from the catalog or create a custom one.
profile_wizard.review_notice: The profile will be saved in the local profiles directory and will be available immediately when creating new projects. You can export it as a ZIP from the Library to share it.
profile_wizard.latex_engine_hint: 推荐XeLaTeX — 支持UTF-8和系统字体。

community.novice_safe_title: Show only reviewed profiles that are ready to start without extra adjustments
community.help_question: I am in the profile library. How do I decide which one suits me if I cannot find an exact match for my institution or program?
community.search_placeholder: 搜索机构、国家、院系、项目…
community.no_results: 无结果。请尝试其他关键词。
community.no_filter_matches: 没有配置文件匹配当前筛选条件。
community.heading: 社区
community.heading_desc: 按机构、学位、领域和项目搜索配置文件。需要互联网连接。
community.guided_hint_title: 你不需要知道准确的配置名称
community.guided_hint_body: 先从你的机构，或学位、领域和引用样式的相近组合开始。如果没有完全匹配，可以先使用简单的机构基础配置，再逐步调整。
community.catalog_load_error: 无法加载配置文件目录。请检查连接或重试。
community.confidence_tip: 如果时间紧迫，优先选择有证据和相关示例的模板。
community.browser_warning: 真实下载仅在桌面应用中可用。浏览器中为模拟。

about.title: 关于
about.tagline: 桌面优先学位论文助手
about.hero: 核心理念很简单：您专注于撰写论文，TeXisStudio 负责结构、格式、参考文献、编译和提交。
about.what_is_card_title: 为不想学 LaTeX 就能完成学位论文的人而生的工具
about.what_is_card_body: TeXisStudio helps undergraduate, specialist, master's, doctoral, and postdoctoral students produce serious academic work without making LaTeX a prerequisite.
about.capability_structure: 帮助您将论文组织成章节和部分。
about.capability_profiles: 通过配置文件应用机构格式，无需手动编辑 LaTeX。
about.capability_citations: 管理引用、参考文献和编译。
about.capability_health: 检查项目状态，在提交前提醒您缺少什么。
about.capability_exports: Prepares final exports with technical evidence when the workflow requires it.
about.boundaries_card_title: 该应用辅助您写作，但不能替代学术判断
about.boundary_institution: It does not replace official institutional guidelines or your advisor/jury's judgment.
about.boundary_profiles: Some profiles have more evidence and verification than others; the Library indicates this.
about.boundary_quality: The academic quality of the research, writing, and argumentation still depends on the author.
about.stack_app: Desktop app built on Tauri + React + TypeScript.
about.stack_core: Academic and compilation core in Rust.
about.stack_profiles: Support for profiles, bibliography, final export, and environment verification.
about.stack_language: Modular spelling and language support with packs and specialized vocabularies.
about.maturity_strong_body: The validation, compilation, profiles, languages, and export core already exists and already solves real academic work.
about.maturity_transition_title: Active transition toward a beginner-first experience
about.maturity_transition_body: The app is being reorganized so the main flow is guided, simple, and centered on moments of work instead of technical tools.
about.maturity_honest_body: TeXisStudio is already a serious academic product, but it is still closing some UX, CI, and institutional coverage contracts before promising a universal premium experience without asterisks.
about.license_body: Source-available. Free for personal, academic, educational, and community use. Direct commercial exploitation requires an agreement with the original author.
about.statusbar_guided: 桌面优先 · 论文引导

setup_latex.intro: TeXisStudio 负责格式化和编译，但需要在计算机上安装工具才能将论文转换为 PDF。您不需要学习 LaTeX。
setup_latex.help_question: I am on the PDF generation setup screen. Which option is best if I just want to start compiling my thesis without getting into technical details?
setup_latex.system_body: 仅显示适用于您操作系统的可用和推荐选项。
setup_latex.guided_ready: 您已可以从 TeXisStudio 生成 PDF。
setup_latex.guided_recommendation: 在 {{platform}} 上，推荐选项是 {{name}}。请按照以下步骤操作。
setup_latex.can_generate_pdf: 您现在可以从编辑器生成 PDF。
setup_latex.no_tool_found: 未找到 PDF 生成工具。请在下方选择一个选项。
setup_latex.basic_recommend_body: it covers most cases without extra configuration. You can install another option later if you need it.
setup_latex.technical_detail_body: TeXisStudio chooses the backend automatically based on what is installed. In advanced mode you can choose the engine manually on the compilation screen.

mactex.tagline: Recommended — finest, most stable and complete output
mactex.description: MacTeX is the full TeX Live distribution for macOS. It produces the most precise and stable output: perfect typography, 100% correct APA/IEEE/Vancouver bibliographies, native support for Cyrillic, CJK, Devanagari and any published LaTeX package. Ideal for final theses, journals, and any document that must look impeccable.
pros: Finest typography and output of any lightweight alternative
100% compatible bibliographies (correct biber version included)
All CTAN packages available without restriction
Native multilingual support: Cyrillic, CJK, Arabic, Devanagari
Correct multi-pass compilation: TOC, indexes, cross-references
One-command Homebrew installation

steps.title: Install Homebrew (if you don't have it)
steps.note: Homebrew is the standard macOS package manager. If you already have it, skip this step.

steps.title: Install MacTeX with Homebrew
steps.note: Downloads ~5 GB. The process takes 10–20 minutes depending on your connection.

steps.title: Update environment variables
steps.note: Or simply close and reopen Terminal so it picks up the new PATH.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.note: All three commands should respond with a version number.

steps.title: Restart TeXisStudio
steps.note: Close and reopen the app so it detects the new installation.

tectonic.tagline: Lightweight — downloads only what it needs
tectonic.description: A modern, self-contained LaTeX engine. Covers 80% of theses without installing gigabytes. If a very specific package fails during writing, you can install MacTeX alongside Tectonic — they coexist without conflict and the app lets you choose which one to use.
pros: Installed in under 1 minute
Downloads only the packages your thesis uses
Coexists with MacTeX if you need both
Upgradeable with brew upgrade
cons: First compilation requires an internet connection
Highly specialized packages (advanced physics, etc.) may require MacTeX

steps.title: Install Homebrew (if you don't have it)
steps.note: If you already have Homebrew, skip this step.

steps.title: Install Tectonic with Homebrew
steps.note: Lightweight download. Ready in under 1 minute.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.note: You should see something like: tectonic 0.15.x

steps.title: Restart TeXisStudio
steps.note: Close and reopen the app so it detects tectonic.

texlive.tagline: Recommended — finest, most stable and complete output
texlive.description: TeX Live is the standard full LaTeX distribution on Linux. It produces more precise and stable output than any lightweight option: perfect typography, 100% correct bibliographies, full multilingual support (Cyrillic, CJK, Devanagari) and all CTAN packages available. The right choice for documents that must look impeccable.
pros: Finest typography and output over lightweight alternatives
100% correct bibliographies — compatible biber version included
All CTAN packages without restriction
Native multilingual support: Cyrillic, CJK, Arabic, Devanagari
Correct multi-pass compilation: TOC, indexes, cross-references
Installation with a single system command
cons: Repository version may be slightly older than the official release

steps.title: Ubuntu / Debian / Linux Mint
steps.note: Includes everything. If space is limited, use texlive-xetex instead of texlive-full.

steps.title: Fedora / RHEL / CentOS Stream
steps.note: Installs the full TeX Live scheme.

steps.title: Arch / Manjaro
steps.note: Installs the main groups and biber for bibliography.

steps.title: openSUSE
steps.note: Full scheme via zypper.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.note: All three commands should respond with a version number.

steps.title: Restart TeXisStudio
steps.note: Close and reopen the app so it detects the new installation.

tectonic.tagline: Lightweight — no system package manager required
tectonic.description: A modern LaTeX engine that covers 80% of theses without gigabytes of disk space. If a very specific package fails, you can install TeX Live alongside Tectonic — they coexist without conflict and the app lets you choose which one to use.
pros: Does not require sudo to install
Downloads only what your thesis needs
Coexists with TeX Live if you need both
cons: Highly specialized packages (advanced physics, etc.) may require TeX Live

steps.title: Install with the official script
steps.note: Downloads and installs the binary in ~/.cargo/bin or ~/bin depending on your setup.

steps.title: Alternative: install with Cargo
steps.note: Requires Rust installed. Compiles from source, takes several minutes.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.note: You should see something like: tectonic 0.15.x

steps.title: Restart TeXisStudio
steps.note: Close and reopen the app.

miktex.tagline: Recommended on Windows — finest output, complete without Perl
miktex.description: MiKTeX is the full LaTeX distribution for Windows. It produces more precise and stable output than Tectonic: perfect typography, 100% correct bibliographies, full multilingual support and all CTAN packages available. Automatically downloads only what you need — efficient and complete at the same time.
pros: Finest typography and output over lightweight alternatives
100% correct bibliographies — biber included and compatible
All CTAN packages, downloaded on demand
Does not require Strawberry Perl (unlike manual latexmk)
Multilingual support: Cyrillic, CJK, Arabic, Devanagari
Easy-to-use .exe graphical installer
cons: The MiKTeX console can be confusing at first
Requires accepting package installation during the first compilation

steps.title: Install MiKTeX with winget
steps.note: Open PowerShell as a normal user (no administrator needed). winget is included in Windows 10/11.

steps.title: Alternative: graphical installer
steps.note: Go to miktex.org → Download → Windows. Download the 64-bit installer and run it. Choose Install MiKTeX only for me.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.note: Should respond with a version number.

steps.title: Restart TeXisStudio
steps.note: Close and reopen the app so it detects MiKTeX.

tectonic.description: A self-contained LaTeX engine that covers 80% of theses. Does not require TeX Live or Strawberry Perl. If a very specific package fails, you can install MiKTeX alongside Tectonic — they coexist without conflict and the app lets you choose which one to use.
pros: Installed in 1 minute with winget
Does not require Strawberry Perl
Coexists with MiKTeX if you need both
Upgradeable with winget upgrade
cons: Highly specialized packages (advanced physics, etc.) may require MiKTeX

steps.title: Install with winget
steps.note: Open PowerShell as a normal user. No administrator needed.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.note: You should see something like: tectonic 0.15.x

steps.title: Restart TeXisStudio
steps.note: Close and reopen the app so it detects tectonic.

texlive.tagline: Complete — finest, most stable output, no surprises
texlive.description: TeX Live on Windows produces the most precise and stable output possible: perfect typography, 100% correct bibliographies, full multilingual support and all CTAN packages. For theses that must look impeccable — theoretical physics, advanced mathematics, multilingual documents — it is the right choice.
pros: Finest typography and output over lightweight alternatives
All CTAN packages included, no additional downloads
100% correct bibliographies — compatible biber included
Native multilingual support: Cyrillic, CJK, Arabic, Devanagari
Compatible with any institutional profile

steps.title: Download the TeX Live installer
steps.note: Go to tug.org/texlive → download → install-tl-windows.exe. Download the installer.

steps.title: Run the installer
steps.note: Choose Simple install (big) to install everything. The process takes 30–90 minutes.

steps.title: Install Strawberry Perl (required for latexmk)
steps.note: Perl is required for latexmk to work on Windows.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.note: All three commands should respond with a version number.

steps.title: Restart TeXisStudio
steps.note: Close and reopen the app.

elements_tab.title: 元素
elements_tab.subtitle: 编辑器中可用的内容块。点击查看详情。

paragraph.name: 段落
paragraph.description: 自由文本块。支持强调、行内引用和行内 LaTeX。
paragraph.latex_output: 转义后的文本直接写入文档。

figure.name: 图
figure.description: 带标题、来源和交叉引用标签的图片。宽度：50%、75%、100%。

table.name: 表格
table.description: 包含表头、行、标题和来源的表格。样式：simple、booktabs、wide、longtable。

equation.name: 公式
equation.description: 带编号或不带编号的数学公式。使用纯 LaTeX 数学语法编写。
equation.latex_output: equation 或 equation* 环境 + 可选 \label

list.name: 列表
list.description: 项目符号列表 (itemize)、编号列表 (enumerate) 或描述列表 (description)。

citation.name: 文献引用
citation.description: 与 .bib 文件中的 BibTeX 键关联的括号式、叙述式或多重引用。

raw_latex.name: 原始 LaTeX
raw_latex.description: 高级场景使用的任意 LaTeX 片段。需要用户确认。

plugins_tab.title: 插件
plugins_tab.subtitle: 可用于插入图形和示意图的 {{count}} 个可视化插件。

figure_picker.title: 插入生成的图形
figure_picker.search_placeholder: 搜索图形…（名称、说明或学科）
figure_picker.try_another: 尝试其他词语或清除筛选条件
figure_picker.footer_hint: 点击任意图形直接插入 · LaTeX包自动添加

figure_edit.latex_preview_dirty: 生成LaTeX的预览（包含当前更改）
figure_edit.plugin_figure_hint: 由插件{{pluginId}}生成的图形。要修改它，请使用预览中的“编辑图形”按鈕。
figure_edit.regen_title: 从原始保存数据重新运行插件。在引擎更新后很有用。
figure_edit.save_title_dirty: 保存新标题和标签而不重新运行插件
figure_edit.visual_hint: 可视化编辑图形 — 无需 LaTeX。点击«应用更改»重新生成。
figure_edit.apply_visual_title: 应用更改并重新生成图形

readiness.delivery_blocked: 最终提交前有待处理的项目
readiness.writing_sections: 至少启用一个内容章节
readiness.writing_draft: 在主要章节中编写内容
readiness.writing_reviewed: 将至少一个章节标记为已修订
readiness.delivery_latex: 确认或删除未验证的LaTeX块
readiness.delivery_committee: 为高级作品完成答辩委员会
readiness.quality_citation: 在正文中包含至少一个可验证的引用
readiness.quality_required_reviewed: 将必填正文章节标记为已修订
readiness.quality_raw_latex: 最终提交前迁移或手动审查导入的LaTeX块
readiness.quality_plugin_warnings: 最终提交前解决图形或插件警告
readiness.quality_profile: 正式提交时使用机构或自定义模板

welcome.heading: 选择语言
welcome.subheading: 您可以稍后在设置中更改。
welcome.catalog_error: 无法加载更多语言。您可以继续使用内置语言。

visual_editor.label: 标签
visual_editor.need_nodes_first: 请至少添加2个节点以创建连接。
visual_editor.matrix_hint: 提示：单元格中可以使用LaTeX表达式，例如 \frac{1}{2}
visual_editor.title: 标题
visual_editor.no_source: 未找到该图形的可编辑数据。
visual_editor.engine_no_editor: 引擎 {{engineId}} 无可视化编辑器。
visual_editor.math_advanced_hint: 此数学表达式可在下方的LaTeX字段中编辑。
visual_editor.plot_type_advanced: 系列类型«{{type}}»无法可视化编辑。请直接编辑LaTeX源代码。

start.intro: TeXisStudio让您无需了解LaTeX即可创建专业学术文档。以下是入门步骤：
start.step1: 1. 从主屏幕创建或打开项目。
start.step2: 2. 从左侧面板选择章节（例如：引言）。
start.step3: 3. 撰写内容 — 标题、段落、列表。
start.step4: 4. 使用Σ按钮插入生成的图形 — 无需LaTeX。
start.tip: 您永远不需要手写LaTeX。TeXisStudio会自动为您生成。

figures.intro: TeXisStudio包含70多种按难度分类的视觉图形类型：
figures.easy_desc: 完全可视化编辑器 — 填写字段或点击添加元素。无需LaTeX。
figures.intermediate_desc: 基于表单的编辑器。部分字段接受数学表达式。
figures.advanced_desc: 技术性字段。推荐给已熟悉LaTeX语法的用户。
figures.tip: 提示：在图形选择器中使用«简单»筛选器查看适合初学者的图形。
figures.visual_editor_desc: 对于支持的图形，点击«编辑»时会出现«可视化编辑器»选项卡。

errors.compile_fail_q: PDF无法编译 — 该怎么办？
errors.compile_fail_a: 打开编译日志。查找以!开头的行 — 这些是错误所在。
errors.missing_pkg_a: 前往设置 → LaTeX设置并验证您的安装。
errors.no_preview_a: 确保已安装并配置Tectonic或TeX Live。
errors.weird_chars_q: PDF中出现奇怪字符（重音符、特殊字符）。
errors.weird_chars_a: 使用UTF-8编码。检查粘贴文本中是否有不兼容字符。

faq.a1: 不需要。应用会自动生成LaTeX。仅高级自定义时才需要。
faq.q2: 我可以编辑生成的LaTeX代码吗？
faq.a2: 可以。每个章节都有«显示LaTeX»切换按钮。也可以导出整个项目。
faq.a3: 点击编辑器工具栏中的Σ（sigma）按钮，选择图形类型，然后点击«插入»。
faq.q4: 插入后可以重新编辑图形吗？
faq.a4: 可以。点击编辑器中的图形块以获取«编辑»按钮。

latex.intro: 在TeXisStudio中您很少需要手写LaTeX。以下是基本要点：
latex.err_dollar: 将数学公式包裹在$…$或\[…\]中
latex.err_extra: 删除多余的}或关闭未关闭的$
latex.hint_curly: xⁿ⁻¹（超过1个字符时需用花括号）
latex.hint_quad: 二次方程 — 使用 * 表示乘法

app_error.title: 出了点问题
app_error.body: TeXisStudio 保留了您的文件。请返回开始界面，然后尝试重新打开项目。

circuit.connections_hint: 节点之间不经过组件的直接接线。
circuit.label: 标签
circuit.need_nodes: 首先添加至少 2 个节点。

chem.empty_hint: 添加公式或反应即可开始。
